title: Telar
definition:
Telar is minimal-computing framework for creating layered IIIF visual narratives for digital scholarship, public exhibitions, community storytelling, and classroom projects. Learn more at [Telar.org](https://telar.org)

Telar es un marco de computación mínima para crear narrativas visuales con capas de texto e imágenes IIIF para humanidades digitales, exposiciones públicas y contextos educativos y comunitarios. Aprende más en [Telar.org](https://telar.org)

title: Love
definition: Love is a form of emotional connection, care, and commitment that can appear through friendship, family, romance, community support, and everyday actions.

title: Friendship
definition: Friendship is a relationship based on trust, companionship, shared time, and emotional support. In this exhibition, friendship appears through conversation, food, humor, and presence.

title: Vulnerability
definition: Vulnerability means being open enough to share feelings, needs, uncertainty, or personal experiences with others. It can help people build deeper relationships.

title: Intimacy
definition: Intimacy is emotional closeness between people. It does not only refer to romance; it can also appear through trust, honest conversation, and shared experience.

title: Belonging
definition: Belonging is the feeling of being accepted and connected to a group or community. At UCSB, belonging can be created through shared spaces, friendship, and care.

title: Companionship
definition: Companionship means being with another person in a way that provides comfort, attention, and support. It often appears in ordinary moments like eating, studying, or talking together.

title: Devotion
definition: Devotion is a strong commitment to someone or something. In this exhibition, devotion appears through academic effort, shared goals, and the willingness to support others over time.

title: Reciprocity
definition: Reciprocity means mutual exchange in a relationship. It suggests that love and care are not one-sided but are built through giving, receiving, and responding to each other.

title: Partnership
definition: Partnership is a relationship in which people support each other, share experiences, and move through challenges together.

title: Connection
definition: Connection is the sense of closeness or relationship between people. It can be created through conversation, shared space, trust, and repeated acts of care.
